# RevengePlugins

# How to install?
Paste a plugin URL into the Plugins page of Revenge, following a basic format of:

https://marcmy.github.io/revenge-plugins/`PLUGIN_NAME`

## Plugins List:
- SplitLargeMessages: [Install Link](https://marcmy.github.io/revenge-plugins/SplitLargeMessages/)
